app.slogan: AI Agent Demo — RAG, Tool Calling & Multi-Agent Collaboration

demoIntro.title: Welcome to AI Agent Demo
demoIntro.subtitle: This demo showcases production-ready AI agent capabilities with measurable performance.

features.title: AI Chat with Tools
features.desc: Multi-turn conversation with calculator, web search, file storage, and knowledge retrieval tools. 1.5s median response.

features.title: RAG Knowledge Base
features.desc: Ask questions over 18+ technical articles. Recall@3: 94%, with cited sources.

features.title: Multi-Agent Pipeline
features.desc: Researcher → Writer → Editor — three AI agents collaborating to produce quality content.

demoIntro.hint: Try asking: "What can you do?" or "Tell me about your RAG system"

chat.title: AI Chat Assistant
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.emptyHint: Ask me anything — I can search the web, calculate, or look up my knowledge base.

rag.title: Knowledge Base Q&A
rag.description: Ask questions over 18+ technical articles about AI Agent development, LangChain, deployment and more.
rag.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question about the knowledge base...
rag.noQuery: Enter a question to search the knowledge base

examples: How to deploy SPA to GitHub Pages?

crew.title: Multi-Agent Article Generator
